execution_environment: Node v22 (server-side static-analysis + pure-module unit tests). Dynamic browser/Firebase clauses of PNV.1 (live two-profile run with real push delivery) are deferred to first user deployment and called out in report.md and the README.
notes: test-suite.mjs validates: scenario library shape + size, sampleNScenarios determinism, charter exports on state.js + push.js, Firestore Security Rules predicate, no-firebase-leaks outside state.js, redaction of opponent data, click-gated notification permission, README four-step setup, share-URL routing, joint-confidence-min ranking on a (5,5)+(5,2)+(3,3)+agreement game (engineered to verify DCA.10/IP8.A2/S4.A7), per-player accuracy, inter-player agreement, two-player cap, no native build artifacts, no non-anonymous auth, no absolute-root asset paths.
